sections.location: Fire alarms are located on the ceiling both upstairs and downstairs.
The water heater is located in the garage.
The circuit breaker is located in the garage.
Water Meter is located on the right side of the property between the back trees. There are double blue lines by the road marking the water meter location.
The HVAC vents are located downstairs in the living room and upstairs in the hallway.
The electric meter is located outside the back door by the garage.
The thermostat is located on the wall downstairs.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
